caption:
Hello everyone, Korean Cultural Society will be holding a movie night on April 3rd, 2022 at 8:30pm. The movie we present will be with Along With God. Share with your friends and relax for a night before the exam. 🎉 We sincerely invite you to join and enjoy the movie with us.🎬

Date&Time: April 3rd, 2022 at 8:30pm
Venue: Google Meet Link in poster

Any inquiries may contact
TAN ZI YUN 01127150607
LAAVANYA 0127111760

Greetings! We are pleased to inform you that KSI MMU Melaka is conducting the 1st Korean Speech Contest. You are invited as an audience to join this long-awaited event as there will be 20 participants who will be delivering their speech. Besides, as an audience, you can win amazing prizes too as we will be having a quiz session during the event! Do fill up the google form to join the fun now! 

Google Form: https://tinyurl.com/sr9mxs9w

Date: 28th October 2021 (Thursday)
Time: 5p.m. to 8 p.m.
Venue: Google Meet

The google meet link will be provided through Email/ Whatsapp before the event! Thank you and have a nice day.

Thank you and have a nice day!

안녕하세요,
Great day Great news!
It’s again time for another exciting event with us!

King Sejong Institute MMU Melaka proudly announce that we’re organizing a K-Pop Cover Dance Competition. It’s time for you to uncover your talent and have fun! Join us to win exciting prizes too!!!
 
Date:
16th December 2021
Time:
5 p.m. to 8 p.m.
Venue:
Google Meet (Online)
Registration Dateline:
10th December 2021
Eligibility:
- The contest is open to Malaysian and foreigners residing in Malaysia besides Korean Nationality.
- This a group competition. Must be between 2-5 people.
- Age: More than 15 years old.
How to enter:
1. The song or dance performance video must be produced as a full version of the selected song of your choice OR a medley of K-pop songs (total video time must be at least 3 minutes long, no longer than 5 minutes).
2. Video entry format:
a. Mp4 format only.
b. 720p or higher resolution.
c. Landscape format only.
d. Brighter lighting condition preferred.
e. File name: Your group name
3. Only 1 entry is allowed for 1 group.
Prizes:
1st place: Prizes worth RM 2,000 + medal
2nd place: Prizes worth RM 1,500 + medal
3rd place: Prizes worth RM 1,000 + medal
 
Participation prize: T-shirt (Only for groups that are chosen for final round)
 
Popularity award: Will be based on likes on our King Sejong Institute MMU Melaka Facebook Page
Contest Method:
Preliminary round
▪ Participants need to register through Google Form and submit their cover dance video.
▪ The best 10 groups will be chosen for Final round.
 
Final Round
▪ The same video submitted for the preliminary round will be played during the Final Google Meet session.
▪ The best 3 performances will be chosen as winners.

Please contact us for inquiries:
 
Facebook: @KSIMMUMELAKA
Instagram: KING SEJONG INSTITUTE MELAKA]
Email:
Aamira: aamira.haifaa@mmu.edu.my
Deena: nurdeena.syazlina@mmu.edu.my
 

#kingsejong #kingsejonginstitute #kingsejonginstitutefoundation #kingsejonginstitutemalaysia #melaka #mmu #learnkorean #korea #kwave #kpopdancecover #kpopevent #kpopcompetition

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 
We are glad to announce that we are having a Korean Culture Promotion on every Monday throughout this semester (Tri 3 2020/2021)!
The first culture that we are promoting is the Korean Honorifics Culture.  It is useful to know this as it will be easier when you are learning Hangul! 
Thank you and have a nice day!

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 

Today’s quote will be from the k-drama “It's Okay To Not Be Okay” starred by Kim Soo Hyun and Seo Yea Ji! Do take a look on the quote! 

Thank you and have a nice day ☺️

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 

Happy Monday!! The second culture that we are promoting is the Korean Idol Birthday Culture. The Korean idol birthday culture are different from other countries and the fans in Korea will celebrate them through cafe events, street banners and ads! 

Thank you and have a nice day!🤗

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 
Aside from Korean Culture Promotion, we will also be posting k-drama/ idol quote on every Friday throughout Trimester 3 2020/2021. 
Today’s quote will be from the k-drama “Start Up” starred by Bae Suzy and Nam Joo Hyuk! Do take a look on the quote! 
Thank you and have a nice day ☺️

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 

The third culture that we are promoting is the Korean Traditional Food Culture. Do take a look at the post.

HELLO EVERYONE

With this post we are signing off from A Word A Day programme. Hope everyone learn something from this initiative we are making to make learning Korean language more fun and enjoyable. 

#letslearnkorean #kcsmmumelaka #multimediauniversitymelaka

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 

Today’s quote will be from the world star BTS! In 2018, BTS released an album named Love Yourself 結 ‘ANSWER’ and through this album, they imparted the message that “loving yourself is true love”. Do take a look at the quote!

Thank you and have a nice day ☺️

안녕하세요! Good day, everyone! 

We are glad to inform that the Korean Cultural Society of Multimedia University Melaka is currently recruiting High-Committees 2020/2021. We do not require experience since you will grow your experience together with us. Those who have experience and want to improve themselves are welcomed too. Become a part of our High Committee and together lets bring more interesting events to all our dear KCS members. 

The divisions available for application are as follows:
-	Assistant Secretary 
-	Assistant Treasurer
-	Head & Assistant Head of Multimedia and Publicity Division (2)
-	Head & Assistant Head of Logistics Division 

The recruitment of high-committee is open to every student regardless of faculty. Hence, for those who are interested in joining this event as high-committee, do kindly fill up the Google Form provided on our bio. The application via Google Form will be closed on 17th Dec 2020.

The interview will be conducted via Google Meet. The details of the interview session will be released to the respective applicants soon.

We look forward to receiving your application and having a diverse range of dedicated committee.

감사합니다! Thank you! 

For any further inquiry, please do not hesitate to contact:
Koh Qiao Rou (President) - 019 - 269 9883
